creator: yonas.yanfa@gmail.com
text:
Perhaps the port needs to be rebuilt?


$ doas service nginx configtest
Performing sanity check on nginx configuration:
nginx: [emerg] module "/usr/local/libexec/nginx/ngx_http_modsecurity_module.so" version 1022000 instead of 1024000 in /usr/local/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:4
nginx: configuration file /usr/local/etc/nginx/nginx.conf test failed


FreBSD 13.2
modsecurity3-nginx-1.0.3
modsecurity3-3.0.8
